prompt: Refactor PaymentProcessor.java to follow our Java coding conventions. The class uses setter injection, mutable state, checked exceptions, and has a long method doing too many things. Don't worry about using streams or Optional — just focus on immutability, small methods, constructor injection, and unchecked exceptions.

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final keyword
No checked exceptions in method signatures
No method exceeds ~20 lines of logic
